agents.name: Karpathy Skills
agents.description: A coding-discipline agent based on Andrej Karpathy's observations of how LLMs fail at code. Enforces four principles — think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, and goal-driven execution — to keep diffs minimal, surface assumptions and tradeoffs, and avoid overengineering.
agents.author: multica-ai

agents.name: Marketing Skills by Corey Haines
agents.description: A library of 43 specialist marketing skills by Corey Haines — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, analytics, lifecycle, retention, pricing, sales enablement, and go-to-market. Grounds every task in a shared product/audience/positioning context document, then applies the matching framework to produce shippable marketing deliverables.
agents.author: Corey Haines

agents.name: Matt Pocock Skills
agents.description: A real-engineering agent bundling Matt Pocock's everyday skills — alignment grilling, TDD, bug diagnosis, PRD and issue authoring, architecture cleanup, and a shared domain language — for shipping production software with coding agents instead of vibe coding.
agents.author: mattpocock

agents.name: Scientific Skills by K-Dense
agents.description: K-Dense's library of 140+ scientific and research skills that turn an AI agent into a research assistant — bioinformatics and genomics, cheminformatics and drug discovery, proteomics, clinical and precision medicine, medical imaging, materials science, physics and astronomy, and scientific machine learning — with curated library APIs, 100+ databases, and worked examples for reproducible multi-step research workflows.
agents.author: K-Dense
